events.description: Scene 1 begins — resolver appears with subtle fade in
Recursive resolver server node fades in
Chain of Questions title appears
Question marks appear one by one
Query pulse travels toward root nameserver
Root nameserver node appears
13 clusters stat badge fades in with count
Globe icon scales in — world emphasis
Root server shakes — doesn't know google.com's IP
Referral badge appears — knows .com zone
Referral badge glows — sending to TLD
Scene 1 crossfades into Scene 2
Scene 2 — TLD nameserver title appears
Resolver (small) and TLD server node appear
Query pulse from resolver to TLD
Domain zone badges appear (.com, .net, .org, .io)
TLD server shakes — doesn't know exact IP
Referral badge — knows Google's authoritative NS
Scene 2 crossfades into Scene 3
Scene 3 — Authoritative nameserver title appears
Chain recap — 3 hop tracker lights up sequentially
Authoritative nameserver node appears with glow
Google NS badge appears with ns1.google.com
Final referral badge — another referral sent with purple glow
